exercises.name: Toe Touch Progression Heels Up
exercises.description:
1. Start standing with your heels elevated on a small block, about 1 inch high. 

2. Soften your knees, and reach down towards your toes until you feel a gentle stretch in your hamstrings.

3. Exhale, then return to the start position.

exercises.name: Toe Touch Progression Toes Up
exercises.description:
1. Start standing with your toes elevated on a small block, about 1 inch high. 

2. Soften your knees, and reach down towards your toes until you feel a gentle stretch in your calves and hamstrings.

3. Exhale, then return to the start position.

exercises.name: Toes to Rings
exercises.description:
1. Start by hanging on a pair of rings, set to shoulder-width. 

2. With straight arms, lift the legs up towards the rings while keeping the knees locked. 

3. Touch the rings with both feet, then return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Torso Rotation Machine
exercises.description: Torso Rotation Machine

exercises.name: Towel Stretch for Internal Rotation
exercises.description: Towel Stretch for Internal Rotation

exercises.name: Towel V raises
exercises.description: Squeeze the towel (you can use a small ball or even a stuffed animal, foam roller ) between your knees. Lean back onto your elbows and forearms. Take a deep breath, kegal (act like you are holding your pee) and pull your stomach in towards your belly button. Reps for this exercise should be slow and controlled. If you let go from holding your core, rest for a few seconds. Reset by pulling your core back in and continue reps.

exercises.name: Trap 3 Raise
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, there will be 2 movements. First will be the shoulder retracting so you'll be squeezing your shoulder blades back end together, then moving your arms fully straightened to 2 and 10 o'clock position.

2. Grab dumbbells, one on each hand, then on an inclined bench, get into position with your body facing the ground and hands all the way down, arms straight. This will be your starting position.

3. Retract shoulders then raise your arms sideways all the way to 2 and 10 o'clock position.. Then back to starting position.

4. Repeat.

exercises.name: Trap Bar "Squat"
exercises.description: Trap Bar "Squat"

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, maintain a back that is in slight extension. 

2. Keep your hips high (relative to a squat where your hips will be lower). When you set your feet, keep them roughly hip-width, or with a little bit of a turn-out.

3. Stand in the center of the apparatus and grasp the centre point of both handles. Lower your hips, look forward with your head and squeeze your shoulder blades together to keep your back set. Raise your hips without losing your set back position. This will be your starting position.

4. Begin the movement by driving through the heels and extend your hips and knees. Avoid rounding or hyper-extending your back at all times.

5. At the completion of the movement, lower the weight back to the ground under control. Back to starting position.

exercises.name: Treadmill wide squat walk
exercises.description: Speed 1.0 or slower

exercises.name: Tricep kick back 2 rep grip change
exercises.description: Db tricep kick back w/ neutral grip (palms facing in) for 2 reps then switch grip to prone (palms facing sky) 2 reps. Alternate back and forth

exercises.name: Tricep wall ext w/banded abd hold
Trunk Rotation
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright.

2. Rotate your torso through the spine and the trunk without allowing the hips to rotate too much from one side to another.

exercises.name: T-Spine Rotation with Reach
exercises.description:
1. Start lying on your side on the mat, with your top knee bent to 90 degrees. 

2. Reach both hands directly out in front of your chest, with palms together. 

3. Slowly rotate your torso towards the opposite side of the mat, stopping once you reach the midline.

4. Using your hand furthest from your legs, reach overhead towards the mat beneath you. 

5. Return to the start position, and repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: T-Spine Rotations with Rib Grab
exercises.description:
1. Start by lying on your side on the mat, with your top knee bent to 90 degrees towards your chest. 

2. Extend your arm closest to the mat fully, and bring your opposite arm to hug your ribs. 

3. Gently rotate your torso open, while giving a gentle pull on the ribs and exhaling. 

4. Return to the start position, and repeat on the opposite side.

exercises.name: Tuck Jump to Push Up
exercises.description:
Start standing with feet hip-width apart. Perform an explosive jump, tucking your knees toward your chest at the peak of the jump. 

Land softly and transition immediately into a push-up, lowering your chest toward the floor and then pressing back up.

exercises.name: Twist Back Extension
exercises.description:
1.Lay on a back extension machine with your thighs on the pads and your upper body bent over at waist, hands behind your head, clasping together.

2.Raise your upper body upright and twist your torso to one side.

3.Lower and repeat, twisting to the other side.

exercises.name: Twisting Cable Extension
exercises.description:
1.Stand holding the rope with your arms straight out in front, your hips and knees slightly bent and your back flat.

2.Pull the rope up and over one shoulder, twisting your upper body to that side.

3.Return to the start position and repeat with the other side.

4.Alternate sides with each rep.

exercises.name: Underhand Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.Grasp the bar using a reverse grip with your arms extended straight overhead.

2.Pull the bar down in front to the top of your chest, bending at the elbows.

3.Straighten your arms fully, returning the bar to the top position.

exercises.name: Upper Body Twist
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back with your hips turned to one side, knees bent and touching the floor with your arms out to the sides at shoulder height.

2.Raise one hand and lift it up and across to touch the other outstretched hand, turning your head to this side also.

3.Return to starting position and repeat.

4.Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other side.

exercises.name: Upper Calf Stretch
exercises.description:
1. For this stretch, you'll want to find a ledge or a step or if you’re at home, you can use the wall.

2. Keep your heel on the ground while you stretch.

3. Keep your leg straight and slowly move your hips forward until you feel the stretch in your calf just below the knee.

4. Once you've held that stretch, switch to the other side.

exercises.name: Upright row w/ banded glute kick hold
V Raise
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back with your knees bent and your feet flat, arms by your sides.

2.Lift your upper body off the floor and raise your legs straight up, coming into a V position.

3.Lower back returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: V Tuck
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back with your legs straight and your arms by your sides.

2.Lift your upper body off the floor and raise your legs straight up, coming into a V position, reaching your hands towards your legs. Ensure to bring your knees in towards your chest and your hands together in the center.

3.Return to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: V Twist
exercises.alternateName: Side to side legs up crunches
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back with your knees bent, feet raised and your arms across your chest.

2.Lift your head and shoulders off the floor, reach your arms straight out to one side while straightening your legs out in front.

3.Lower your head and shoulders, bend your knees and bring your arms back across your chest, returning to starting position.

4.Alternate sides with each rep.

exercises.name: V Up
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back with your legs straight and your arms stretched out overhead.

2.Raise your legs straight up while also lifting your upper body off the floor and reach your hands toward your feet, keeping both your arms and legs straight.

3.Slowly lower your upper body and legs back to the floor, returning to starting position. 

4.Repeat.
